market_themes.US: FCC certification (Part 15/18); Section 301 tariff risk; BIS export controls & Entity List
market_themes.EU: CE/RED conformity; RoHS & REACH; WEEE producer responsibility; EU TARIC alignment
market_themes.DE: EU single market requirements; CE/RED, RoHS/REACH, WEEE, and German market surveillance
market_themes.NL: EU single market requirements; CE/RED, RoHS/REACH, WEEE, and Dutch customs/logistics checks
market_themes.SG: Singapore IMDA telecom approval, safety standards, strategic goods controls, and re-export screening
market_themes.MX: Mexico NOM standards, customs valuation/origin, IMMEX exposure, and USMCA route sensitivity
market_themes.ASEAN: Rules of origin (Form E/RCEP); transshipment & anti-circumvention for Vietnam/Malaysia routes
market_themes.RU: Dual-use controls; international sanctions red lines; embargoed electronic components
market_themes.TW: Cross-strait semiconductor licensing; special technology transfer permits
market_themes.JP: PSE electrical safety; TELEC radio approval; Japan-origin fab equipment import controls
market_themes.KR: KC unified national certification; Korea-origin memory/semiconductor screening
market_themes.GLOBAL: General China import/export baseline; CCC/SRRC/CEL where applicable
market_themes.VN: Vietnam MIC ICT/radio conformity, MOIT energy labeling, customs classification, and battery/ESS import checks
market_themes.MY: Malaysia MCMC/SIRIM telecom approval, ST electrical safety COA, customs classification, and battery/ESS import checks

RU.export: Screen dual-use export controls, international sanctions red lines, and electronic component embargo risk for Russia-bound shipments.
RU.import: Verify Russia-origin items against sanctions and restricted party lists before China import.

TW.import: Screen Taiwan-origin semiconductor equipment, wafer technology, and special cross-strait technology licensing requirements.
TW.export: Assess cross-strait technology transfer restrictions for Taiwan-related electronics.

ASEAN.export: Emphasize rules of origin compliance and transshipment / anti-circumvention risk for Vietnam and Malaysia routes.
ASEAN.import: Check ASEAN origin documentation and re-export control for electronics supply chains.

US.export: Include US HTS alignment, Section 301 / BIS export control, and entity list exposure.
US.import: Review US-origin technology licensing and re-export conditions.

EU.export: Include EU TARIC alignment, CBAM reporting, and dual-use export screening.
EU.import: Check EU-origin controlled technology and REACH-related obligations where relevant.

DE.export: Apply EU export controls plus Germany-specific customs and market-surveillance checks where relevant.
DE.import: Review Germany-origin technology, CE/RoHS/REACH evidence, and EU dual-use re-export conditions.

NL.export: Apply EU export controls plus Netherlands logistics, transit, and customs documentation checks.
NL.import: Review Netherlands-origin or EU-transit goods for EU compliance evidence and re-export conditions.

SG.export: Screen Singapore strategic goods controls, IMDA telecom approval, and re-export requirements.
SG.import: Check Singapore-origin electronics for strategic-goods, telecom, and safety documentation.

MX.export: Screen Mexico NOM, customs/origin, and USMCA supply-chain implications for outbound shipments.
MX.import: Check Mexico-origin electronics for NOM evidence, origin documentation, and customs valuation support.

JP.import: Screen Japan-origin semiconductor manufacturing equipment and controlled technology items.
JP.export: Assess Japan market access and export notification for high-tech goods.

KR.import: Screen Korea-origin semiconductor equipment, memory ICs, and export-licensed technologies.
KR.export: Assess Korea outbound licensing for advanced electronics.

GLOBAL.export: Apply general China export compliance baseline when no specific destination rule matches.
GLOBAL.import: Apply general China import baseline for unspecified origins.

VN.export: Screen Vietnam origin, export documentation, and ASEAN transshipment/origin exposure where relevant.
VN.import: Check Vietnam MIC ICT/radio conformity, MOIT energy labeling, customs classification, and battery/ESS import requirements.

MY.export: Screen Malaysia origin, export documentation, and ASEAN transshipment/origin exposure where relevant.
MY.import: Check Malaysia MCMC/SIRIM telecom approval, ST electrical safety COA, customs classification, and battery/ESS import requirements.
